summary_one_line: Input must carry a structured protocol/URL prefix (pop3 scheme + path) so data->state.wildcardmatch is set, gating the true branch.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed scheme/URL header in the leading bytes (e.g. literal 'pop3' at offset 0x06 followed by a '/' path) that drives curl's URL parser to set data->state.wildcardmatch=TRUE, after which the true side of 'if(data->state.wildcardmatch && !(PROTOPT_WILDCARD))' is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All 5 winner seeds carry an intact protocol-string prefix: offsets 0x06-0x09 are concentrated on 70(p) 6f(o) 70(p) 33(3) ('pop3') and offsets 0x0a-0x1a hold a coherent host:port path '/?27.0.0.1:9001'; the per-role overlay shows only the winner taking the assignment line 4273 and the divergent-branch table shows the blocker T=6 F=0 for W.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds are short, degenerate noise ('%' runs, repeated punctuation) with no recognizable scheme at offsets 0x06-0x09 (e.g. 64(d) 55(U) 43(C) at those offsets), so the parser never sets wildcardmatch and the blocker resolves T=0 F=10 for L.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile's CMP_MAP feedback; the I2S stage substitutes intercepted comparison operands (scheme tokens like 'pop3') directly into the input at the compared offsets, synthesizing the structured prefix the blocker depends on. value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and only gets coarse Hamming/prefix-distance bucket credit, which is insufficient to assemble the multi-byte scheme literal.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of a wildcardmatch gate inside Curl_init_do.
The single decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog > value_profile with delta I2S.
Winner seeds carry an intact 'pop3' scheme prefix and a host:port path.
Winner bytes at the scheme offsets are concentrated on the literal 'pop3' characters.
Only the winner takes the wildcardmatch=FALSE assignment, and the blocker resolves true only for W.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L4271  T=6 F=0  T=0 F=10  if(data->state.wildcardmatch &&  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Loser seeds lack a recognizable scheme at the same offsets, holding noise bytes instead.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile's feedback.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 505 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 7bcbae710a7130dd`; the 23-level ancestor chain contains I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 21 and 22, the unwrapped-I2SRandReplace floor signal exclusive to cmplog/vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where value_profile_cmplog reaches the true branch just as often when the scheme/URL prefix is replaced with random bytes (i.e. wildcardmatch is set independent of any compared literal), showing I2S operand substitution is not what built the structured prefix.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact parser path from the leading bytes to data->state.wildcardmatch=TRUE is inferred from source structure plus seed shape; the prompt does not show the URL-parse code that sets wildcardmatch.
